game.name: Retroarch
game.desc: RetroArch 1.21 (released April 2025) is the latest stable version of the powerful, open-source frontend for Libretro cores — basically the “one-stop emulator launcher” that powers almost every retro handheld and PC emulation rig. It runs thousands of classic games from NES to PS2, Dreamcast, and beyond, with shaders, netplay, rewind, and ultra-low latency.

game.name: Retroarch 32 bit
game.desc: RetroArch 1.21 (released April 2025) is the latest stable version of the powerful, open-source frontend for Libretro cores — basically the “one-stop emulator launcher” that powers almost every retro handheld and PC emulation rig. It runs thousands of classic games from NES to PS2, Dreamcast, and beyond, with shaders, netplay, rewind, and ultra-low latency.
